title: Bridge Essay: Affect-biased attention and predictive processing.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference as causal cognition.

**Affect-biased attention and predictive processing.**. Cognition.. PMID: 32593013. DOI: 10.1016/j.cognition.2020.104370. In this paper we argue that predictive processing (PP) theory cannot account for the phenomenon of affect-biased attention - prioritized attention to stimuli that are affectively salient because of their associations with reward or punishment.
